title: Notifications - Device charging
scenario: Charging notification does not appear when headset is plugged into charger while Poly Lens app is in background
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and connect a Bluetooth headset (not fully charged).
2. Press the Home button or switch to another app to send the Poly Studio Mobile app to the background.
3. Plug the connected headset into a charger.
4. Observe the notification that appears from the Poly Studio Mobile app.
5. Verify the notification displays the headset name and the text "Charging".
6. Verify the Poly Studio Mobile app icon is visible on the notification.
expected: A notification appears showing the headset name and "Charging" text, with the Poly Studio Mobile app icon visible. Tapping the notification redirects the user to the Poly Studio Mobile app's Home screen for the device.
